title: Miracle-Monde
description: Mods that have amazing mods that Improves your experience with our server like performance wise or look wise thanks to with the shaders which comes with is optional if you want it on or not
body:
Welcome to our server!
We're excited to have you here. Our community is all about fun, engaging events, and immersive roleplay. Our staff is friendly and here to help—if someone is being rude or breaking the rules, please report it to us and we’ll do our best to resolve the issue.

Have suggestions? We’re always looking to improve! Feel free to post your ideas—especially mods that could enhance the experience alongside the Miraculous Mod. Our custom modpack is designed to provide the best possible gameplay, and we’re always open to making it even better with your input.

Enjoy your time here!

![Sponser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69c5ff58ef061c0e6fadee4a7a4a8f00e3fcaf3_0.webp)


[Use this link to order your server!!!](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1234)      

Support us from our Ko Fi page

 

 

This ModPack have been made by one of our discord staff members called: WahajPlayz

 


We highly suggest you to join our discord server then you will be noticed when a event or a Roleplay going on.
